name: tier4_poam_shape_to_ca5
description: Lever C (2026-06-11): a Plan of Action & Milestones workbook is classified by its column shape (weakness + scheduled-completion + milestones + point-of-contact + status) as evidence_type='poam'. This case pins the Tier-4 routing half: evidence_type='poam' fans out to EVERY child objective of CA-5 (the single family-pure control a POA&M is the literal artifact for) at relevance 0.8 / confidence 0.6 with an 'Auto-classified as poam' rationale. Family-purity is pinned by negative controls: AT-4 (a different family-pure Lever-C target) and CM-8 (the inventory target) are seeded but must stay untagged — poam maps to ca-5 alone, never spraying across families. The xlsx classifier half (column shape -> 'poam') is pinned separately in backend/tests/evidence/test_poam_training_autotag.py.
